footnote_legend.text: Amortized Cost Fair Value Percentage of Net Assets Cash Equivalents State Street Institutional Money Market Fund

Represents the actual interest rate for partially or fully funded debt in effect as of the reporting date. PIK represents payment-in-kind interest that is accrued and recorded as interest income at the contractual rates,
Amortized Cost Fair Value Percentage of Net Assets Investments—non-controlled/non- affiliated

Position or portion thereof is an unfunded loan commitment, and no interest is being earned on the unfunded portion, although the investment may be subject to unused commitment fees. Negative cost and fair values are the
The investment is not a qualifying asset under Section 55
